mission.title: Daily Namespace Resource Quota Monitoring
mission.description: Recurring orbit mission that monitors namespace resource quotas and limit ranges. Detects namespaces approaching their CPU, memory, or pod limits to prevent scheduling failures and resource exhaustion.

steps.title: List all resource quotas and utilization
steps.description: Show all ResourceQuota objects with their current usage vs. hard limits across all namespaces.

steps.title: Detect quotas above 80% utilization
steps.description: Identify resource quotas where usage exceeds 80% of the hard limit, indicating namespaces at risk of hitting their ceiling.
commands: kubectl get resourcequotas -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | .metadata.namespace as $ns | .metadata.name as $name | .status | to_entries[] | select(.key | startswith("used.")) | {ns: $ns, name: $name, resource: (.key | ltrimstr("used.")), used: .value} + ({hard: (.key | ltrimstr("used.") | . as $r | input_line_number)} | {}) | "\($ns)/\($name) \(.resource): used=\(.used)"'

steps.title: Check for namespaces without quotas
steps.description: List namespaces that have no ResourceQuota configured, which could allow unbounded resource consumption.
commands: comm -23 <(kubectl get namespaces -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}{"\n"}{end}' | sort) <(kubectl get resourcequotas -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.namespace}{"\n"}{end}' | sort -u)

validation.command: comm -23 <(kubectl get namespaces -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}{"\n"}{end}' | grep -v '^kube-' | sort) <(kubectl get resourcequotas -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.namespace}{"\n"}{end}' | sort -u) | wc -l

steps.title: Review LimitRange defaults
steps.description: Show all LimitRange objects to verify default CPU and memory limits are set for containers that do not specify their own.

steps.title: Check for pods with no resource requests
steps.description: Identify pods that do not set CPU or memory requests, which makes quota enforcement and scheduling unpredictable.
commands: kubectl get pods -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.spec.containers[] | (.resources.requests.cpu == null) or (.resources.requests.memory == null)) | "\(.metadata.namespace)/\(.metadata.name)"' | head -20

resolution.summary: Resource quota monitoring complete. All namespace quotas, limit ranges, and pod resource requests have been reviewed. Namespaces approaching their limits have been identified.

prerequisites.description: Requires kubectl with cluster access and jq for JSON parsing.
